name: Etsy sellers managing 10–50 orders/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 orders/month, stock shortages cause missed sales opportunities. We provide automated inventory alerts instead of manual inventory tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Stock shortages leading to missed sales opportunities.
features: Threshold setting for low stock alerts
